name: verdict-ui
description: Design QA for AI-generated interfaces. Renders your UI in a real browser, runs objective design checks (WCAG contrast, type-scale consistency, spacing-grid consistency, heading/landmark hierarchy), auto-fixes what's safely fixable, compares a whole site's shared components for cross-page drift, tests structural integrity across viewport widths, forces every interactive element through :hover/:focus-visible/:active to catch bugs that only exist on interaction, tracks score history, gates CI on regressions, and diffs before/after renders pixel-by-pixel -- so you can verify an AI coding agent's output instead of trusting the prompt you gave it.
author: Pranav Kokati
